title: OREGON FARMERS MARKETS LOCATOR TOOL - 211info
text: OREGON FARMERS MARKETS ASSOCIATION OREGON FARMERS MARKETS LOCATOR TOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps locate farmers markets where shoppers can find fresh produce, meat, dairy, eggs, baked goods, pantry staples, beverages, ready-to-eat foods from local vendors, and specialty items such as body care products, flowers, and live plants. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Sites accept SNAP/EBT, WIC, Farm Direct Dollars and Double Up Food Bucks DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Varies by market AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Farmers Markets Farmers Markets * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
